resources.string: Unlock the numbers, dates & colors aligned with your soul
Calculated based on your name and birth date
Dates that resonate with your Life Path Number
Most favorable days of the week for you
Colors that enhance your energy and luck
Your life\'s purpose and natural talents

Last updated: November 2025

NumLuck ("we", "our", or "the app") respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use the NumLuck mobile application.

1. Information We Collect
NumLuck is designed to work entirely on your device. We do not require you to create an account, and we do not collect, store, or transmit your personal information to any server controlled by us.

When you use the app, you may enter the following information locally:
• Your first name
• Your last name
• Your date of birth

This information is used only on your device to calculate your numerology results and is not sent anywhere.

2. How We Use the Information
The information you enter is used solely to:
• Calculate your Life Path, Destiny, Soul Urge, Personality, Birthday, Maturity and Personal Year numbers
• Generate your lucky dates, days and colors
• Display these results to you within the app

We do not use your data for advertising, profiling, or any analytics.

3. Data Storage
Any information you enter remains on your device. Closing the app may clear this information. NumLuck does not keep a copy of your data on any external server.

4. Data Sharing
We do not share, sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. Because we do not collect your data, there is nothing for us to share.

5. Third-Party Services
NumLuck does not integrate third-party analytics, advertising, or tracking SDKs.

6. Children's Privacy
NumLuck is intended for general audiences and does not knowingly collect information from children under the age of 13. If you believe a child has entered personal information in the app, please remove the app from the device.

7. Permissions
NumLuck does not request access to your contacts, camera, microphone, location, photos, or any sensitive data.

8. Security
Because your data remains on your device, its protection depends primarily on the security of your device. We recommend keeping your device updated and using a screen lock.

9. Changes to This Policy
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The updated version will be available within the app. Continued use of the app after changes means you accept the updated policy.

10. Contact Us
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
support@numluck.app

By using NumLuck you agree to this Privacy Policy.

Last updated: November 2025

Welcome to NumLuck. By downloading, installing or using the NumLuck application (the "App") you agree to these Terms & Conditions. Please read them carefully.

1. Acceptance of Terms
By using the App you confirm that you have read, understood and agreed to these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please stop using the App.

2. Eligibility
You must be at least 13 years old to use NumLuck. By using the App you confirm that you meet this minimum age requirement.

3. Nature of the Content
NumLuck provides numerology-based readings, lucky numbers, lucky dates, lucky days and lucky colors based on classical numerology principles.

All content provided in the App is for entertainment, self-reflection and informational purposes only.

NumLuck readings are NOT a substitute for professional advice, including but not limited to:
• Medical, psychological or mental-health advice
• Legal advice
• Financial, investment or business advice
• Relationship or therapy advice

You should not make significant life decisions based solely on the content shown in the App.

4. No Guarantees
Numerology is a traditional system of beliefs. We do not guarantee any specific outcome, benefit, improvement or result from following the App's suggestions. Any actions you take based on the App are at your own risk.

5. Use of the App
You agree to use NumLuck only for lawful, personal, non-commercial purposes. You agree not to:
• Reverse engineer, decompile or modify the App
• Use the App in a way that could damage, disable or impair it
• Copy or redistribute the App without our written permission
• Use the App to harass or mislead others

6. Intellectual Property
All content within the App — including the name "NumLuck", the logo, the user interface, the calculations and the descriptive text — is owned by or licensed to us and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You receive a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use the App for personal use.

7. User-Entered Information
Any information you enter (such as your name and date of birth) stays on your device and is used only for calculations within the App. You are responsible for the accuracy of the information you enter.

8. Third-Party Services
The App may be distributed through third-party stores (e.g. Google Play). Your use of those stores is governed by their own terms.

9. Disclaimer of Warranties
The App is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied, including merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose or non-infringement.

10. Limitation of Liability
To the maximum extent permitted by law, we will not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages arising out of or related to your use of the App — including loss of profits, loss of data, personal injury, or decisions made based on the App's content.

11. Changes to the App and to These Terms
We may update the App and these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the App after an update means you accept the revised Terms.

12. Termination
We may suspend or discontinue the App (in whole or in part) at any time without notice. You may stop using the App at any time by uninstalling it.

13. Governing Law
These Terms are governed by the laws of your country of residence, unless another jurisdiction is required by applicable law.

14. Contact
For questions about these Terms & Conditions, please contact:
support@numluck.app

By using NumLuck you agree to these Terms & Conditions.
